g.text: NON-HS KERNEL — HeartSuite is not active. No enforcement. No logging. No backups.
The following approved entries will be enforced in Secure Mode:
Once active, anything not on this list will be blocked.
Switching to Secure Mode is not reversible from the HeartSuite interface.
To return to Setup Mode, use the Maintenance screen.
Type YES to activate Secure Mode:
